case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. PAUL JOHNSON et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-14-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, PAUL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-19-2011

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, PAUL $19,695.15 PRINCIPAL, $1,083.39 INTEREST, $434.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,213.04, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB SERVED MAY-22-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, PAUL
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, PAUL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $434.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, PAUL

DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B) VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-14-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
